title: Tragacantha venosa
intro: Tragacantha venosa, also known as astragalus, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries to promote overall health and well-being, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, which may help to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases. The bioactive constituents of astragalus include flavonoids, saponins, and polysaccharides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, astragalus is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is commonly used to support the treatment of chronic diseases, such as cardiovascular disease, diabetes, and cancer.
